name: Index International Group Public Company Limited
summary: Index International Group Public Company Limited operates as an engineering consultancy company in Thailand. The company provides a range of services in specialized fields, such as project planning; city and district planning; architectural design involving landscaping and architecture; and engineering design involving structural, electrical, mechanical, transportation, sanitary, geotechnical, environmental, and water resources engineering. Its services also comprise master planning in the fields of site reconnaissance and survey, socio-economic survey and analysis, and feasibility analysis; and complete design and engineering services for construction and contract bidding, such as preliminary engineering design, detailed engineering design, scale models when required, specification and drawings, bills of quantities, other technical description required for procurement and construction, and geographic information system. In addition, the company offers project management/construction supervision and design√Ç¬ñbuild services. Index International Group Public Company Limited was founded in 1983 and is based in Pathumthani, Thailand.
